title: Design receipt state-store normalization path
goal: Define a safe path for normalizing historical task_status receipt rows that are superseded by current embedded registry verification.

metadata.source: Registered after PR #253 classified superseded receipt drift as non-blocking but did not rewrite the state database.
metadata.safety_boundary: No state DB rewrite without backup, dry-run, receipt hash inventory and rollback documentation.

lease_scope_migration.rationale: Receipt normalization is bounded to StateStore handling and Registry verification reconciliation.
does_not_establish: safe mutation of terminal historical tasks

acceptance.assertion: Tool lists exact task_status rows that would be normalized and the embedded registry verification that supersedes them.
Apply requires a state DB backup or explicit reviewed backup waiver.
Historical receipt rows are not deleted; any normalization preserves receipt references or writes an audit event.
After normalization, runtime-drift-check remains ok and no true stale receipt blocker is hidden.
